title: Chronicles of Religious Persecution in China
original_title: Chronicles of Religious Persecution in China
overview: "A window to understanding the true lives of Chinese Christians and Christian families, as well as a reflection—rarely seen in recent years—of the experiences and emotions of Chinese Christians who have been persecuted as a result of their faith."
